endpoints.name: Describes the Resource Provider
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.NetApp Rest API operations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check file path availability
endpoints.description: Check if a file path is available.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Check resource name availability
endpoints.description: Check if a resource name is available.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Describe all NetApp Accounts in a resource group
endpoints.description: List and describe all NetApp accounts in the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Describe a NetApp Account
endpoints.description: Get the NetApp account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create or update a NetApp account
endpoints.description: Create or update the specified NetApp account within the resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Delete a NetApp account
endpoints.description: Delete the specified NetApp account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Update a NetApp account
endpoints.description: Patch the specified NetApp account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Describe all Capacity Pools
endpoints.description: List all capacity pools in the NetApp Account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Describe a Capacity Pool
endpoints.description: Get details of the specified capacity pool
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create or Update the specified capacity pool within the resource group
endpoints.description: Create or Update a capacity pool
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Delete a capacity pool
endpoints.description: Delete the specified capacity pool
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Update a capacity pool
endpoints.description: Patch the specified capacity pool
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Describe all volumes
endpoints.description: List all volumes within the capacity pool
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Describe a volume
endpoints.description: Get the details of the specified volume
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Create or Update a volume
endpoints.description: Create or update the specified volume within the capacity pool
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Delete a volume
endpoints.description: Delete the specified volume
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Update a volume
endpoints.description: Patch the specified volume
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Authorize source volume replication
endpoints.description: Authorize the replication connection on the source volume
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Break volume replication
endpoints.description: Break the replication connection on the destination volume
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Delete volume replication
endpoints.description: Delete the replication connection on the destination volume, and send release to the source replication
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Describe all mount targets
endpoints.description: List all mount targets associated with the volume
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Get volume replication status
endpoints.description: Get the status of the replication
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Resync volume replication
endpoints.description: Resync the connection on the destination volume. If the operation is ran on the source volume it will reverse-resync the connection and sync from source to destination.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.description: List all snapshots associated with the volume

Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POOLNAME}} with a real poolname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.
